addons.name: [After-Tour] Winter Vancouver Hotel Booking (Breakfast Not Included)
addons.description:
Double/Triple/Quadruple/Single Room: USD$178.00 / CAD$215.00 / Night / Room.
Reference Hotels: Hampton Inn by Hilton Vancouver Airport, Accent Inns Vancouver Airport, Grand Park Hotel Vancouver Airport, or similar.
Please contact customer service for confirmation before placing your order. Prices in Canadian dollars do not include the 5% GST (Government Service Tax).

addons.name: [Pre-Tour] Winter Vancouver Hotel Booking (Breakfast Not Included)
addons.description:
Double room/Triple room/Quadruple room/Single room: USD$178.00 / CAD$215.00 /night/room.
Recommended hotels: Hampton Inn by Hilton Vancouver Airport, Accent Inns Vancouver Airport, Grand Park Hotel Vancouver Airport, or similar.
Please contact customer service for confirmation before placing your order. Prices in Canadian dollars do not include the 5% GST (Government Service Tax).

addons.name: [Vancouver/Calgory] 4-day Service Fee
addons.description: USD$15 or CAD$20 per person per day

addons.name: BAW/BACW Mandatory Fee
addons.description: Includes: Banff National Park Admission Ticket + Banff Gondola/Lake Louise Gondola
